protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: Pipette 6 µL of MIL or IL onto plant tissue; allow to incubate; collect liquid; add to qPCR buffer. One-step cell lysis without surfactants or elevated temperatures

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: Suspend plant tissue in Tris-based buffer; add MIL; disperse using a vortex; recover MIL with a magnet; pipette into qPCR buffer

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: Grind plant tissue to powder; add tissue, MIL/IL, and qPCR buffer to reaction tube; reaction run at 60 C with 0.05% Tween20 and 2.5% DMSO

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: MIL or IL coats plant tissue to facilitate cell lysis; lysate integrated into qPCR; compatible with sequencing or Qubit; desorption at 90 C

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: static one-step cell lysis and DNA extraction... MIL coated leaf was incubated at 25 C... 0.3 uL of MIL was added to the qPCR assay

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: dispersive one-step lysis... DNA-enriched MIL was washed once with water... heating all recovered MIL at 90 C

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: Conventional plant cell lysis... CTAB lysis buffer (2% CTAB...). After heating the tissue at 60 C... sample was centrifuged

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: SDS lysis was performed... ground plant tissue, PVPP, RNase... 50 mM Tris-EDTA... for 15 min at 100 C... centrifuged at 13,000 rpm
